nasb.text: Jacob lived in the land of Egypt seventeen years; so the length of Jacob’s life was one hundred and forty-seven years.

esv.text: And Jacob lived in the land of Egypt seventeen years. So the days of Jacob, the years of his life, were 147 years.

cnv.text: 雅各在埃及地住了十七年；他一生的壽數是一百四十七歲。

ccb.text: 雅各在埃及住了十七年，他一共活了一百四十七岁。

csbs.text: 雅各又在埃及地活了十七年；他一生的年日有一百四十七年。
